mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent (id, name, description, system_prompt, tools_config, context_config, rag_config, is_builtin, status) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{description}, #{systemPrompt}, #{toolsConfig}, #{contextConfig}, #{ragConfig}, #{isBuiltin}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM agent WHERE id = #{id} AND status != 'deleted'
SELECT * FROM agent WHERE status != 'deleted' ORDER BY is_builtin DESC, create_time ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM agent WHERE status != 'deleted'
SELECT * FROM agent WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY is_builtin DESC, create_time ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE agent SET status = 'deleted' WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM agent WHERE id = #{id}
